summary: Iteration 79 - Complete testing of new Journal settings and reset features. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified - cutoff date editor, reset button, toast notifications, subtitle updates.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend journal.py: Well-structured settings endpoints with proper validation (YYYY-MM-DD format)
Backend: _get_cutoff()/_set_cutoff() properly read/write from app_settings collection
Backend: Reset endpoint correctly deletes journal_manual collection and optionally sets cutoff
Backend: Dashboard response now includes 'cutoff' field for frontend display
Frontend JournalTab.jsx: Clean cutoff editor implementation with collapsible UI
Frontend: Reset button with proper confirm dialog and toast feedback
Frontend: Subtitle dynamically shows current cutoff date
seed_data_creation: Test data created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 verified new Journal settings and reset features. Key data-testids: journal-cutoff-btn (open editor), journal-cutoff-editor (editor card), journal-cutoff-input (date input), journal-cutoff-save (save button), journal-reset-btn (reset button). Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/journal/settings (cutoff_date management), POST /api/journal/reset (delete manual ops + optionally set cutoff). Dashboard response includes 'cutoff' field. Reset deletes all journal_manual entries and clears chat history in UI.
